design_philosophy: A bold, modern startup design prioritizing a premium SaaS look. We combine the high-contrast clarity of Archetype 4 (using a structural off-white/black foundation) with the user-requested 'purple-blue gradient accent'. We avoid generic SaaS layouts by using asymmetric bento grids for marketing, generous negative space, and a tactile 'crystal glass' aesthetic for overlays.

headings.rules: Never center by default. Use tight tracking (`tracking-tight` or `tracking-tighter`). High-contrast weight usage.

body.rules: Loose line-height (`leading-relaxed`), highly legible, optimized for data density in dashboards.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing on the landing page for breathing room. Dashboard will use denser spacing.

landing_page.grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12 (Mode A: Tetris Grid)
landing_page.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Heavy typography. Max image height 80vh on mobile.

dashboard.grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 (Mode B: Control Room Grid)
dashboard.cards: Cardless or flat cards with sharp edges/minimal radius (max 8px). 1px subtle border. No heavy drop shadows, use 1px inner border for depth.

mobile_first.rules: Ensure perfect rendering on 360px, 390px, 430px. Use standard Tailwind breakpoints (`sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`). Hide sidebar behind a hamburger menu on mobile, visible on desktop.

surfaces_and_microthemes.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5`. Z-index 50. Content must not cut off readability.
surfaces_and_microthemes.pricing_cards: The 'Tracing Beam' concept or subtle 1px neon glow around the most expensive/combo plan (`border-[#4F46E5] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(79,70,229,0.15)]`). Inner padding `p-8`.
surfaces_and_microthemes.toast_system: Fixed top, max z-index (`z-[9999]`), bold solid background (Red for error, Green for success) with high-contrast white text. Minimalistic, no borders. Smooth drop-in animation.

components_strategy.landing_page: Pure HTML + Tailwind CSS. Raw div/section usage for overlapping and asymmetry. Avoid Shadcn containers here to keep it organic and distinct.
components_strategy.dashboard_and_forms: Use customized Shadcn UI. Tables, Inputs, Selects, Dialogs. Strip generic Vercel looks. Make inputs sharp (`rounded-md`), borders subtle, focus rings using the purple-blue accent.
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn charts or Recharts. Keep it clean, use gradient fills under the line.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react for generic UI (already installed). Use @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone or specific brand icons (IG/WA).
components_strategy.i18n: Language switcher in the header (AZ/TR). Routes must handle `/az` and `/tr` seamlessly.

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements MUST have hover states. Buttons lift slightly (`-translate-y-[1px]`) with shadow expansion.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (`transition-all duration-300 ease-out`). No generic `transition-all` on heavy elements.
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Smooth scroll enabled for landing page.

hero_background.description: Abstract white geometry. Use as a subtle, low-opacity textural background for the hero or pricing section to break the flat white.

feature_owner.description: Small business owner using a phone. Use in the 'Features' or 'Target Audience' section to build trust and show real-world application of the AI operator.

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
technical_requirements.error_boundary: Implement React Error Boundary to prevent white screens. Must show a branded fallback UI if a crash occurs.
technical_requirements.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use `aria-hidden` for decorative svgs.
